name: Wined Teriyaki Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice steaks diagonally across grain into 1/4-inch strips.
2. Place in a large bowl and mix wine, soy sauce, onion, garlic, lemon juice, brown sugar or honey, beef broth, and crushed gingerroot.
3. Pour the mixture over meat and marinate for 1 hour, turning occasionally.
4. Thread onto skewers and grill until done as desired.
5. Makes 30 to 40 servings.
